input.title: Intermittent 500 errors when saving snippets in production
input.content:
Symptom: when users save a snippet, about 5% of requests return 500 Internal Server Error. Logs show that the pgx connection pool is saturated.

Reproduction: send 50 concurrent POST requests to /api/v1/snippets.

Suspected causes:
1. The default connection pool size of 10 is too small
2. Long-running upsert transactions are holding connections
3. The AI worker and the main service share the same connection pool

FIXME: temporarily raise max_conns to 30 to stop the bleeding, then investigate transaction duration.
TODO: give the AI worker a dedicated connection pool.
